name: HSBC Midcap Fund

key_facts.Current NAV: The Current Net Asset Value of the HSBC Midcap Fund - Direct Plan as of Jul 03, 2026 is Rs 517.82 for Growth option of its Direct plan.
key_facts.Fund Size: The HSBC Midcap Fund - Direct Plan currently holds Assets under Management worth of Rs 14249.22 crore as on May 31, 2026.
key_facts.Expense ratio: The expense ratio of the fund is 1.24% for Direct plan as on Jul 03, 2026.
key_facts.Exit Load: HSBC Midcap Fund - Direct Plan shall attract an Exit Load, "Exit load for units in excess of 10% of the investment, 1% will be charged for redemption within 1 year."
key_facts.Minimum Investment: Minimum investment required is Rs 5000 and minimum additional investment is Rs 1000. Minimum SIP investment is Rs 500.

performance.Trailing/Category Returns: Its trailing returns over different time periods are: 15.62% (1yr), 26.92% (3yr), 19.94% (5yr) and 20.25% (since launch). Whereas, Category returns for the same time duration are: 4.69% (1yr), 19.2% (3yr) and 16.54% (5yr).

objective: Investment Objective - The scheme seeks to generate long-term capital growth from an actively managed portfolio of equity and equity related securities of predominantly mid cap companies.
